assertions.assertion: Mentions ISamlSigninStateStore for distributed sign-in state persistence
Mentions ISamlLogoutSessionStore for distributed SLO session tracking
Recommends persistent storage (EF Core, Redis) instead of in-memory for multi-node
assertions.rationale: Recommends database-backed stores and Redis for distributed state.

assertions.assertion: Notes that without distributed stores, SSO/SLO state is lost across nodes
assertions.rationale: Does not specifically mention SSO/SLO state being lost without distributed stores.
